summary.title: Summary
summary.body: Ebovir Biotech ("Ebovir", "we", "us", or "our") is committed to protecting personal information in accordance with Quebec Law 25 and other applicable Canadian privacy laws.

scope.title: Scope
items: Name, date of birth, contact information
Medical and genetic data (with explicit consent)

ai.title: Use of AI
ai.body: Our services use artificial intelligence systems to analyze medical and genetic information and generate structured outputs. AI outputs are not medical diagnoses and do not replace licensed healthcare professionals.
